description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a bare upper torso, displaying defined musculature and several prominent tattoos on the chest, arms, and back. The figure has a full beard and medium-length hair, styled with some volume and texture. He is wearing fitted pants that reach just above the ankles and sturdy boots, giving a rugged and utilitarian appearance. The arms are adorned with armbands, and the back features a large, intricate tattoo design. The overall look suggests a strong, possibly outdoorsy or survivalist character, with a confident and upright posture. The skin tone is natural, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing the figure's athletic build.
description: A muscular, tattooed adult male with a bare torso, fitted pants, and boots, standing upright with a rugged appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular chest, tattoos, beard, and facial features, as well as the fitted pants and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm musculature, profile of the face, and the close fit of the pants and boots.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a large, detailed tattoo across the upper back, muscular shoulders, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm, side profile, and the fit of the clothing and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted pants and armbands with sturdy boots, bare upper torso
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair with volume and texture, full beard
